title: Fullstack Developer Roadmap
description: This roadmap combines frontend and backend paths to guide you in becoming a versatile fullstack developer capable of building end-to-end applications.

stages.title: Frontend Foundations
stages.description: Start with the building blocks of the web.

modules.title: HTML, CSS, & JavaScript
modules.description: Master the core trio of web development.

modules.title: Responsive Design
modules.description: Build websites that work on all devices.

modules.title: DOM Manipulation
modules.description: Learn how to interact with web pages dynamically.

modules.title: Choose a Language (e.g., Node.js)
modules.description: Select and learn a backend language.

modules.title: Databases (SQL & NoSQL basics)
modules.description: Understand how to work with data.

modules.title: REST APIs
modules.description: Learn to build communication channels between client and server.

stages.title: Modern Frameworks
stages.description: Leverage frameworks to build faster and more efficiently.

modules.title: Frontend Framework (e.g., React)
modules.description: Choose and master a component-based UI library.

modules.title: Fullstack Framework (e.g., Next.js)
modules.description: Explore frameworks that handle both client and server.

stages.title: Authentication & Security
stages.description: Learn how to secure your applications and manage users.

modules.title: Authentication Strategies
modules.description: Implement JWT, sessions, or third-party auth.

modules.title: Common Security Principles
modules.description: Learn about CORS, CSRF, and data validation.

stages.title: Deployment & DevOps
stages.description: Ship your applications to the world.

modules.title: Containerization (Docker)
modules.description: Package your application for consistent deployment.

modules.title: CI/CD Pipelines
modules.description: Automate your build, test, and deployment process.
